title: Selenium
description: This project endeavors to create a comprehensive performance optimization solution by integrating the functionalities of the most widely recognized performance-enhancing mod packs.
body:
This project endeavors to create a comprehensive **performance optimization solution** by integrating the functionalities of the most widely recognized performance-enhancing mod packs for fabric.

You may freely incorporate this content within your modpacks, ensuring to **cite the respective creators** and provide appropriate attribution links.
